true_header: The parties wish to enter into business discussions and pursuant thereto each of the parties wish to  disclose  confidential  information  to  the  other  party  hereto  about  their  own  intellectual  property,
The parties wish to regulate how such confidential information is to be treated in order to protect the party owning such confidential information.
To use the confidential information of the other solely in,
Without prejudice to the generality of clause 2,
The provisions of this agreement shall not apply to information:
Which is required to be disclosed by law, provided that,
The confidential information is disclosed on an as is basis.
Neither party shall acquire any intellectual property rights or other right,
The parties agree that the construction,
Mutual non-disclosure/confidentiality agreement this agreement effective the day of , 2013.
The term confidential information shall not include information, which is:
In the public domain other than by a breach of this agreement by the receiving party;
Rightfully received from a third party with no duty of confidentiality; or
Rightfully known to the receiving party without any limitation on use or disclosure prior to its receipt from the disclosing party;
Independently developed by employees, agents or consultants of the receiving party; or
Generally  made  available  to  third  parties  by  the  disclosing  party  without  restriction  on disclosure.
This agreement will be effective as of the date of this agreement,
This agreement shall be governed by,
This agreement constitutes the entire agreement, written or verbal,
Time shall be of the essence in this agreement.
All information treated by the discloser as confidential; and
Disclosed  by  the  discloser  to  the  recipient  or  of  which  the  recipient  becomes aware,
Made public other than by the recipient breaching this agreement;
Known to the recipient free of any obligation to keep it confidential; or
Independently  developed  by  the  recipient  without  use,
Maintained  confidential  with  at  least  the  standard  of  care  that  the  recipient maintains to protect its own confidential information;
Not disclosed to any unauthorised person;
Potential customers and partners names;  pricing arrangements;  specifications and drawings;
Accounting  systems  and  management information systems;
Business  plans,  models,  reports,  and market projections;
The  status  of  the  project  or  opportunity; and
The  fact  that  the  parties  have  made  information  available  to  each  other  and  are inspecting or evaluating that information;
As a pre-condition to the receiver,

Now,  therefore,  in  consideration  of  these  premises,  and  other  good  and  valuable consideration,  the  receipt  and  sufficiency  of  which  consideration  is  hereby  acknowledged,  the  recipient covenants and agrees with the receiver as follows:
All data and information, in whatever form communicated or maintained, whether orally,
All plans, proposals, reports, analyses, notes, studies, forecasts,
The existence and terms of this agreement and any other agreements related to a possible transaction;
The fact that information has been disclosed or made available to the recipient or the recipient's representatives;
The fact that discussions or negotiations are or may be taking place with respect to  a  possible  transaction,
Is  available  to  the  recipient  or  the  recipient's  representatives  on  a  non- confidential basis from a source other than the receiver,
Is  at  the  time  of  disclosure  known  to  the  recipient  or  thereafter  becomes generally  available  to  the  public,
"definitive  agreement" means a binding definitive  written  agreement to consummate a transaction;
"party"  means  a  party  to  this  agreement  and  "parties"  means  all  parties  to  this agreement;
"permitted purpose" shall have the meaning set out in recital c;
"person"  is  to  be  broadly  interpreted  to  include  any  individual,
"representatives" means, in respect of a party, such party’s agents,
"transaction" shall have the meaning set out in recital b.
As  a  condition  to  receiving  the  confidential  information,
The confidential information shall remain at all times the property of the company.
The  recipient  shall  comply  with  the  canada  personal  information  protection  and electronic  documents  act,
Prior to the closing of the transaction (the "closing"), the recipient shall:
If the transaction proceeds, following the closing, the recipient shall,
In  accepting  and  reviewing  the  confidential  information,
This agreement will continue indefinitely, unless otherwise agreed in writing by the receiver.
The fact that discussions and negotiations are taking place concerning the purpose and the status of those discussions and negotiations;
All  confidential  or  proprietary  information  relating  to:
Confidential information does not include information which:
Which  is  or  subsequently  becomes  public  knowledge  or  publicly  available  through  no  fault  of  the receiving party;
Which  is  known  by  the  receiving  party  prior  to  the  time  of  receipt,
Which  is  lawfully  obtained  by  the  receiving  party  from  a  third  party  and  is  not  subject  to  a  similar restriction on disclosure;
Which is independently developed by receiving party; or
The parties agree in writing is not confidential.
Keep the confidential information secret and confidential,
Not use or exploit the confidential information in any way except for the purpose;
Not disclose or make available any confidential information in whole or in part to any person except as expressly permitted by and in accordance with this agreement;
To establish and maintain adequate security measures to safeguard the confidential information from unauthorized access or use.
To its and its affiliate’s representatives,
As may be required by an order of any court of competent jurisdiction or governmental body in which case the receiving party shall,
Return or destruction of confidential information
Upon  the  disclosing  party’s  written  request,
Clause 5.1 of this agreement shall not apply to:
Confidential  information  held  electronically  in  archive  or  back-up  systems  which  are  not  otherwise reasonably retrievable by the representatives of the receiving party or its affiliates;
Copies  of  confidential  information  which  must  be  retained  by  the  receiving  party  pursuant  to applicable law.
Each party reserves all rights in its confidential information.
No obligation to disclose or continue discussions
Term and survival of confidentiality obligations
